text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, come get into a nasty quarrel<n>with me!
Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
See, I heard a rumor from a classmate. If<n>two
people confess their feelings for<n>each other under
the last tree lining the<n>main walkway, they'll be
inseparable for<n>life.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But if their feelings don't align and it<n>leads to a
quarrel, they'll resent each<n>other for life instead...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So we must go and get into a quarrel! No<n>jinx can
stop us. We'll prove that we can<n>still be just as
close afterwards!
